_comment: 模板 jiugongge-cihui 首个视频。内容与示例视频 temp/TikTok.mp4 完全一致：9 个日常动作词。

shot.content: The chubby girl just waking up, sitting up in a small cozy bed and stretching both arms up with a big sleepy happy yawn, a little round alarm clock on a nightstand beside the bed.
The chubby girl taking a bath, sitting inside a cute little bathtub full of white foam bubbles, a shower head above sprinkling water, happily splashing with a joyful face.
The chubby girl eating breakfast at a small table, a plate with a sunny fried egg and a piece of toast in front of her, a cup and a glass of orange juice, holding a fork with a happy smile.

Just the chubby girl by herself, sitting and happily typing on a small laptop held on her lap, a focused cheerful smile — ONLY the girl and the little laptop, no desk, no room, no wall, no furniture, nothing else around her.
The chubby girl grocery shopping, happily pushing a small shopping cart filled with fresh vegetables and drink bottles, holding a shopping bag in one hand.
The chubby girl exercising, sitting on a blue yoga mat and lifting a small dumbbell with one hand, wearing a little sporty headband, an energetic happy face.
The chubby girl eating dinner at a table, a plate of food with a drink glass in front of her, holding a fork and a knife, a warm happy face.
The chubby girl watching television, sitting on a small cozy sofa holding a remote control, a retro TV set in front of her showing a little flower on screen, relaxed happy face.
The chubby girl reading a book, sitting down and holding an open book with both hands, a curious delighted face, a couple of closed books stacked beside her.
